roles.title: Student Assistant
roles.description: Developing and optimizing hybrid qubit-qumode (CV/DV) simulation kernels on HPC systems. Running performance and scalability benchmarks. Mentors: Dr. Doru Thom Popovici and Dr. Katherine Klymko.

roles.title: GRO Intern (ORISE)
roles.description: Contributed to QFw scaling work published at SC'25 Workshops and QCE'25. Implemented and benchmarked hybrid quantum-HPC workflows on Slurm-based GPU clusters.

roles.title: Graduate Research Intern
roles.description: Co-developed the QFw quantum framework and demonstrated multi-node QAOA scaling on HPC systems, resulting in Best Poster at QCUF 2024 and Top-6 Finalist at SC 2024.

roles.title: Graduate Student Researcher (ORISE)
roles.description: Developed a PEPS-based tensor network extension to TNQVM, published at QCE'23. Conducted research in quantum simulation under Dr. In-Saeng Suh.

roles.title: Graduate Research Assistant
roles.description: Researching high-performance tensor network contraction optimizations under Dr. Frank Mueller.

roles.title: Software Development Engineer 3
roles.description: Built microservices in Go and microfrontends in React on Walmart's Kubernetes platform.

roles.title: Software Development Engineer II
roles.description: Built orchestration tools to automate lifecycle management of Walmart's global infrastructure (stores, distribution centers, data centers).

roles.title: Software Development Intern
roles.description: Designed and implemented a dynamic task scheduler using Python, Flask, and React.js for infrastructure maintenance.

organization: Centre for Cloud Computing and Big Data, PES University

roles.title: Research Assistant
roles.description: Collaborated with Dr. Subramaniam Kalambur on research projects including Sameeksha and Green Bangalore.

roles.title: Co-Op
roles.description: Benchmarked AMD and Intel processors for kernel-level workloads such as netperf.
